title: Revoted: Wildfire
description: Adds the Wildfire (Mob D/The Hovering Inferno) from the 2017 Mob Vote and overhauls Nether Fortresses with a new ominous event
body: # About Adds the Wildfire (Mob D/The Hovering Inferno) from the 2017 Mob Vote and overhauls Nether Fortresses with a new ominous event # Features ### Changes to Nether Fortress generation ⦁ Nether Fortresses are now much larger ⦁ The "castle" section of the Nether Fortress can now contain Blaze Spawners ⦁ Blaze Spawner platforms will now be marked with Caged Fire blocks ⦁ Nether Fortresses will now carve out the terrain around them ⦁ Nether Fortress legs will no longer block bridges ⦁ New blocks called Frenzy Spawners will now be scattered around Nether Fortresses (inactive except during a Frenzy) ⦁ Blaze Spawners are replaced with permanently active Frenzy Spawners that only spawn Blazes ⦁ Chests will now appear in more locations in Nether Fortresses and can contain Ominous Bottles and Fireproof Upgrade Smithing Templates ### Frenzies ⦁ If a Player with Bad Omen enters a Nether Fortress, Bad Omen will turn into Frenzy Omen. This will trigger a Frenzy in the Fortress ⦁ During a Frenzy all of the Frenzy Spawners in the Nether Fortress will activate ⦁ Active Frenzy Spawners will periodically spawn groups of Nether Fortress mobs ### The Wildfire ⦁ Wildfires will spawn from Blaze Spawners in the Nether Fortress until the number of Wildfires matches the level of Frenzy Omen ⦁ Wildfires always know where you are ⦁ Wildfires won't take damage until all of their shields are broken ⦁ When a Wildfire's shield is broken, the Wildfire will summon reinforcements from nearby Frenzy Spawners ⦁ Wildfires can shoot barrages of fireballs and create powerful shockwaves ⦁ When killed, a Wildfire has a chance to drop a Wildfire Fragment, which can be used in a lot of recipes ### Caged Fire ⦁ 3 Wildfire Fragments can be used to craft 12 Caged Fire blocks, a new decorative light source ### Inferno Banner Pattern ⦁ 1 Paper and 1 Wildfire Fragment can be used to Inferno Banner Pattern, which looks similar to the pattern on the Wildfire's shields ### Wildfire-shaped Firework Star ⦁ Including a Wildfire Fragment in the recipe for a Firework Star will result in the blast resembling the Wildfire's helmet ### Fireproof items ⦁ Combining an item with a Wildfire Fragment in a Smithing Table will make the item fireproof (requires Fireproof Upgrade Smithing Template) ### Heart of the Inferno, Crucible, and Crucible Power ⦁ 9 Wildfire Fragments can be crafted into a Heart of the Inferno, which can be used to craft the Crucible ⦁ The Crucible behaves similarly to a Conduit. When a fire is lit beneath it and a cubic frame of Nether Fortress-related blocks is built around it, it will attack nearby enemies and grant Crucible Power to all nearby players ⦁ Players with Crucible Power become immune to fire, and are capable of swimming in lava, seeing further in lava, and breaking blocks faster in lava # Credits ⦁ Certain sounds are modified versions of sounds from Minecraft and Minecraft Dungeons [![](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/20a1f917-fbe2-49bb-b6be-2ca9ebec7cd1.webp)](https://bisecthosting.com/alexandersfunandgames) If you need a server to play Minecraft with your friends, try out Bisect Hosting! Use my code ***alexandersfunandgames*** to get 25% off your first month!
